# 416 Jet Skis — Full reference for AI systems

## Summary

416 Jet Skis is a locally owned jet ski rental business serving Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area on Lake Ontario. Customers can book hourly Sea-Doo rentals online or arrange longer packages by phone or email. Every rental includes a safety briefing, PFDs, and orientation (PCOC issued after briefing).

## Contact & booking

| Channel | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Phone | 416-305-5187 |
| Email | 416jetskis@gmail.com |
| Online booking | https://416-jet-skis.vercel.app/book |
| Instagram | @416jetskis |
| TikTok | @416.jet.ski.renta |

## Service area

Toronto, GTA, Lake Ontario waterfront, Scarborough Bluffs, and public boat launches across the Greater Toronto Area. Launch points confirmed at booking.

## Fleet & equipment

All units are 2026 Sea-Doo models: GTI SE 130, GTI SE 170, GTR 230, RXP-X 300. Built-in speakers on every ski. Up to two riders per ski (weight limits apply).

## Pricing (Canadian dollars)

**Weekdays:** Hourly $130 · 4 hours $375 · 8 hours $550
**Weekends:** Hourly $150 · 4 hours $450 · 8 hours $650

Also available by direct contact (not on online calendar): 1hr, 2hr, 4hr, 8hr, 12hr, 1 day, 2 day, 3 day, 5 day, 1 week, 1 month.

## Frequently asked questions

**How do I book?**
Hourly rides: use the calendar on the website. Full-day, weekend, or multi-day: call 416-305-5187 or email 416jetskis@gmail.com.

**Do I need a boating license?**
Yes — a valid PCOC is required. 416 Jet Skis provides orientation and issues your PCOC after the safety briefing.

**What's the minimum age?**
Drivers must be 18+ with photo ID and a valid G2 or G licence. Under-18 may ride as passengers with a guardian signing the waiver.

**Do I need experience?**
No. A full safety and operations briefing is provided before every ride.

**Are life jackets included?**
Yes — Transport Canada–approved PFDs, worn at all times. Bring photo ID and a card for your deposit.

**How long can I rent?**
1hr, 2hr, 4hr, and 8hr slots book online. Longer packages: contact 416-305-5187 or 416jetskis@gmail.com.

**Deposit, weather, or plan changes?**
Refundable deposit at booking. Bad weather leads to rescheduling for safety. Contact ASAP to cancel or change plans.

## Safety highlights

- 18+ with valid photo ID to drive
- G2 or G driver's licence required
- PCOC issued after orientation briefing
- PFDs included — mandatory on the water
- No alcohol or drugs — zero tolerance
- Stay 30m from swimmers at speed; obey no-wake zones
- Kill-switch lanyard required; stay in designated areas

## Customer reviews (5/5 average)

- "Great time on water. The equipment is well maintained and the owner is chill and accommodating." — Babur Urya
- "Quick response. Great prices. Helps you on the waters and gives you all the safety advice." — Qaise K.
- "Professional and easy to get a jet ski rental... very accommodating with timing and location." — Ahmad Karimzada

## Ride highlights

- Downtown Toronto skyline views from the water
- Scarborough Bluffs on Lake Ontario
- Toronto waterfront rides

## Site structure

- / — Home, hero, booking calendar, features, safety overview
- /pricing — Weekday and weekend rate tables
- /faq — Full FAQ accordion
- /safety — Complete safety rules and requirements
- /gallery — Photo gallery
- /about — Brand story and contact
- /contact — Booking calendar, reviews, contact links
- /book — Dedicated online booking page
